notice: Structured-config parameter-source and save-review truth stays explicit: every per-value row shows key/path identity, masked display, source class, resolution time, winner, override action, and copy/export posture; value chips distinguish literal values, env refs, secret handles, policy-injected values, and runtime-discovered values without widening access to raw secrets; round-trip banners and compare-before-save sheets keep comment, unknown-key, ordering, and extension-namespace rewrite risk visible before mutation; and effective-value review plus export summaries reuse the same disclosure classes so support/export never imply a safer or richer payload than the editor actually has.

parameter_row_vocabulary.label: Key
parameter_row_vocabulary.description: Stable key or path identity used across editor, review, export, and support.

parameter_row_vocabulary.label: Display
parameter_row_vocabulary.description: Masked, redacted, or placeholder display rather than raw secret bytes.

parameter_row_vocabulary.label: Source class
parameter_row_vocabulary.description: Literal, env ref, secret handle, policy-injected, or runtime-discovered classification.

parameter_row_vocabulary.label: Resolution time
parameter_row_vocabulary.description: When the value becomes concrete for the active target or runtime.

parameter_row_vocabulary.label: Winner
parameter_row_vocabulary.description: Which layer won precedence or why the row remains unresolved/deferred.

parameter_row_vocabulary.label: Override action
parameter_row_vocabulary.description: Layer-bounded reset, clear, source-open, or policy-open action.

parameter_row_vocabulary.label: Copy/export posture
parameter_row_vocabulary.description: Whether the row exports a local literal, reference/handle, redacted placeholder, key path, or metadata summary only.

value_chip_vocabulary.label: Literal
value_chip_vocabulary.description: Stored as an authored literal value; copy/export stays local-review first when sensitive.

value_chip_vocabulary.label: Env ref
value_chip_vocabulary.description: Stored as an environment-variable reference rather than a concrete secret.

value_chip_vocabulary.label: Secret handle
value_chip_vocabulary.description: Stored as a vault, keychain, or delegated handle; raw secret export stays blocked by default.

value_chip_vocabulary.label: Policy injected
value_chip_vocabulary.description: Resolved from managed policy or signed bundle rather than authored inline.

value_chip_vocabulary.label: Runtime discovered
value_chip_vocabulary.description: Observed or derived at runtime and never masquerades as canonical authored text.

output_disclosure_vocabulary.label: Literal value
output_disclosure_vocabulary.description: The review/export contains at least one literal value.

output_disclosure_vocabulary.label: Reference/handle
output_disclosure_vocabulary.description: The review/export contains only a handle, alias, or env reference for the secret-bearing row.

output_disclosure_vocabulary.label: Redacted placeholder
output_disclosure_vocabulary.description: The review/export contains a placeholder instead of the value body.

output_disclosure_vocabulary.label: Key-path metadata only
output_disclosure_vocabulary.description: The review/export contains only key/path identity and source metadata.

value_chips.label: Literal
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Reveal locally before copying the literal.

value_chips.label: Env ref
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Copy the env reference, not a concrete password.

value_chips.label: Runtime discovered
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Observed at runtime only; source/export stays metadata-only.

effective_value_review_sheet.export_posture_label: Literal values stay local-only; refs/metadata travel by default.

summary_lines: Contains literal values only after local review.
Contains env references instead of concrete secrets.
Runtime-only values export as key-path metadata.

value_chips.label: Literal
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Hostname copies only after local review.

value_chips.label: Secret handle
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Only the vault handle is portable.

value_chips.label: Policy injected
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Managed policy owns the effective value.

effective_value_review_sheet.export_posture_label: Support/export keeps handles and policy metadata distinct from literals.

export_summary.posture_label: Literal host + handle-only secret + redacted policy summary.
summary_lines: Contains the literal host value after local review.
Contains a secret handle instead of the password body.
Policy-owned rows downgrade to redacted placeholders in support/export.

value_chips.label: Literal
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Literal URL copies only after local review.

value_chips.label: Secret handle
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Handle-only auth; raw token stays blocked.

value_chips.label: Policy injected
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Managed policy owns the final header.

value_chips.label: Runtime discovered
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Observed after auth; never authored as stable text.

effective_value_review_sheet.export_posture_label: Literal base URL stays local-review first; auth/policy/runtime rows narrow to handles or metadata.

export_summary.posture_label: Mixed literal, handle, redacted policy, and key-path metadata summary.
summary_lines: Contains the literal base URL after local review.
Contains a handle instead of the auth token body.
Policy-owned rows export as redacted placeholders.
Runtime-only rows export as key-path metadata.

value_chips.label: Env ref
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Reference survives export; resolved value does not.

value_chips.label: Secret handle
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Handle-only notebook auth.

value_chips.label: Literal
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Literal extension metadata copies only after review.

round_trip_risk_banner.risk_summary: Unknown extension namespaces and inline comments may rewrite during structured save.
round_trip_risk_banner.safe_path_label: Edit raw source instead when extension metadata is authoritative.

compare_before_save_sheet.limitation_summary: Structured save cannot prove that comments and extension namespaces survive unchanged.
compare_before_save_sheet.fallback_path_label: Open raw manifest source for authoritative edits.

effective_value_review_sheet.export_posture_label: Manifest exports keep handles and may redact namespace-carrying rows in support packets.

export_summary.posture_label: Literal namespace rows + handle-only secrets with redacted support posture.
summary_lines: Literal extension metadata is disclosed explicitly.
Secret-bearing auth rows export as handles only.
Support packets may further redact namespace-heavy rows instead of rewriting them.

value_chips.label: Literal
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Literal origin copies only after review.

value_chips.label: Policy injected
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Managed preview auth never exports raw cookie material.

value_chips.label: Runtime discovered
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Preview token is machine-local runtime state.

round_trip_risk_banner.risk_summary: Preview runtime config may normalize ordering and strip comments on structured save.
round_trip_risk_banner.safe_path_label: Use raw source when comment layout or authored ordering carries meaning.

compare_before_save_sheet.limitation_summary: Structured editing is not allowed to hide comment loss or ordering changes behind preview-looking defaults.
compare_before_save_sheet.fallback_path_label: Edit the canonical source or review the compare sheet before save.

effective_value_review_sheet.export_posture_label: Preview exports keep policy/runtime state narrow and machine-local.

export_summary.posture_label: Literal authored rows + redacted policy state + key-path runtime metadata.
summary_lines: Literal preview origin is disclosed explicitly.
Policy-backed preview auth narrows to redacted placeholders.
Runtime device tokens export as key-path metadata only.

value_chips.label: Secret handle
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Handle-only workflow input.

value_chips.label: Literal
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Literal workflow env is reviewable and local-first.

value_chips.label: Policy injected
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Policy target is review-only locally.

round_trip_risk_banner.risk_summary: Workflow bundle manifests may reorder unknown step keys and imported extension fields.
round_trip_risk_banner.safe_path_label: Prefer raw source or the compare sheet when imported bundle metadata is authoritative.

compare_before_save_sheet.limitation_summary: Unknown step keys and imported extension metadata may reorder under structured save.
compare_before_save_sheet.fallback_path_label: Open the canonical bundle source when imported metadata must stay byte-stable.

effective_value_review_sheet.export_posture_label: Bundle review/export keeps handles and policy ceilings explicit before publish.

export_summary.posture_label: Literal bundle env + handle-only secrets + redacted policy ceilings.
summary_lines: Literal workflow env rows are named explicitly.
Registry auth remains a handle, never a raw token.
Policy targets narrow to redacted placeholders in export/support.

value_chips.label: Env ref
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Reference survives; concrete token does not.

value_chips.label: Policy injected
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Managed routing remains policy-owned.

value_chips.label: Literal
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Literal matrix rows are reviewable and explicit.

round_trip_risk_banner.risk_summary: CI env descriptors may rewrite comments and normalize authored order during structured save.
round_trip_risk_banner.safe_path_label: Compare before save when inline comments or matrix order are part of the review surface.

compare_before_save_sheet.limitation_summary: Structured edits may drop authored comments or reorder matrix rows during save.
compare_before_save_sheet.fallback_path_label: Use the compare sheet or edit raw source when order/comment fidelity matters.

effective_value_review_sheet.export_posture_label: CI exports keep token refs separate from policy-owned region state.

export_summary.posture_label: Literal matrix rows + env refs + redacted policy state.
summary_lines: Literal matrix values remain explicit.
NPM token stays an env reference.
Policy-owned region state narrows to redacted placeholders in support/export.

value_chips.label: Env ref
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Profile ref is portable; resolved host state is not.

value_chips.label: Secret handle
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Assume-role alias never exports raw credentials.

value_chips.label: Runtime discovered
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Observed endpoint remains metadata-only.

round_trip_risk_banner.risk_summary: Infra descriptors may rewrite unknown provider keys and extension namespaces on structured save.
round_trip_risk_banner.safe_path_label: Prefer compare-before-save or raw source when provider-specific namespaces are authoritative.

compare_before_save_sheet.limitation_summary: Provider-owned keys and extension namespaces may not round-trip safely through structured edits.
compare_before_save_sheet.fallback_path_label: Open the raw descriptor when provider-specific namespaces are contract-critical.

effective_value_review_sheet.export_posture_label: Infra review keeps provider refs/handles explicit and runtime observations metadata-only.

export_summary.posture_label: Reference/handle rows plus key-path-only runtime observations.
summary_lines: Provider refs and role aliases remain handles/references.
Observed runtime endpoints export as key-path metadata only.

value_chips.label: Policy injected
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Policy-owned row exports only the key/path metadata.

value_chips.label: Policy injected
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Credential rows stay redacted unless reviewed locally from the signed bundle.

value_chips.label: Runtime discovered
value_chips.reveal_posture_label: Observed cache state is metadata-only.

effective_value_review_sheet.export_posture_label: Managed policy overlays export as key-path metadata and redacted placeholders only.

export_summary.posture_label: Key-path metadata plus redacted placeholders; no raw literals or secrets.
summary_lines: Support/export keeps policy-owned rows at key-path or redacted-placeholder depth only.
Observed entitlement cache state remains metadata-only.
